title: BUbreakingSectionTwo
description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from BUbreakingSectionTwo, skipping any feeds with errors.

items.title: The Ex-Taxi Driver at the Center of Russia’s Shadow War
items.description: The Kremlin’s sabotage campaign against European allies of Ukraine has been escalating. It needs people like Aleksei Kolosovsky, 42, to carry it out.

items.title: DOJ probes Netflix’s power over filmmakers in Warner deal review
items.description: It's the clearest sign yet that the Trump administration is going beyond a standard deal review as it investigates the merger.

items.title: NASA delays moon mission to fix rocket, rules out March launch
items.description: NASA engineers found an interruption in the flow of helium — which is needed for launch — in the rocket.

items.title: JPMorgan admits for the first time it closed Trump’s accounts after the Jan. 6 attack as lender fights his $5 billion ‘debanking’ lawsuit
items.description: “In February 2021, JPMorgan informed Plaintiffs that certain accounts maintained with JPMorgan’s CB and PB would be closed.”

items.title: At Least 15 Have Died on Tahoe-Area Slopes This Year
items.description: Three more skiers have died in the Lake Tahoe area since the deadliest avalanche in California history on Tuesday killed nine.

items.title: In the $3 trillion private credit market, the ‘shadow default’ rate is increasing as more money chases lower-quality deals
items.description: A decline in interest rates offered by the Fed plus excessive demand for private credit investments has reduced yields for investors.

items.title: Fat Signing Bonuses, and Concierge Service, for Family Doctors
items.description: In a country where a quarter of the population lacks a family doctor, Canadian communities compete in a zero-sum battle to recruit family doctors.

items.title: Johannes Hoesflot Klaebo Leads Norway to Record Olympic Medal Haul
items.description: Norway, led by the cross-country skiing sensation Johannes Hoesflot Klaebo, topped the medal table for the fourth straight Winter Games.
